chunks.text: Xilinx Software - UCB EECS License Xilinx Software - UCB EECS License public page Xilinx licenses are available within EECS on an EECS instructional license server. Access is limited to students and employees in EECS classes and research group

nd employees in EECS classes and research groups on EECS subnets. Computers in EECS instructional labs access these licenses. Faculty, grad students and staff with funded EECS accounts may get license information here for their own computers

license information here for their own computers (login with your EECS LDAP account and password) Please see xilinx.help for more information about Xilinx on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) WEB: http://ins
